description: Site-specific data items for prostate cancer, AJCC 8th Edition. Includes PSA, Gleason scoring, and grade groups.

items.name: PSA (Prostatic Specific Antigen) Lab Value
items.valid_codes: Numeric XX.X (0.1-999.9), XXX.X=1000+ ng/mL, XX0.1=Value stated as less than 0.1, XX9.8=Test not done, XX9.9=Unknown
items.clinical_significance: PSA affects AJCC stage grouping. PSA <10, 10-20, >20 correspond to different risk levels

items.name: Gleason Patterns Clinical
items.description: Gleason primary and secondary patterns from needle biopsy or TURP (two-digit code: primary + secondary)

items.name: Gleason Patterns Pathological
items.description: Gleason primary and secondary patterns from radical prostatectomy or autopsy
items.valid_codes: Same as clinical patterns, derived from prostatectomy specimen

items.name: Gleason Score Clinical
items.description: Gleason score (sum of patterns) from needle biopsy or TURP
items.clinical_significance: Higher Gleason score indicates more aggressive cancer

items.name: Gleason Score Pathological
items.description: Gleason score from radical prostatectomy or autopsy

items.name: Gleason Tertiary Pattern
items.description: Tertiary Gleason pattern from prostatectomy (if present)
items.valid_codes: 03-05=Tertiary pattern value, X5=No tertiary pattern, X8=Not applicable, X9=Unknown
items.clinical_significance: Presence of high tertiary pattern may indicate worse prognosis

items.name: Grade Clinical
items.description: ISUP Grade Group based on clinical Gleason score
items.valid_codes: 1=Grade Group 1 (Gleason 6), 2=Grade Group 2 (Gleason 3+4=7), 3=Grade Group 3 (Gleason 4+3=7), 4=Grade Group 4 (Gleason 8), 5=Grade Group 5 (Gleason 9-10), 9=Cannot be assessed
items.clinical_significance: Grade Group correlates with prognosis and treatment recommendations

items.name: Grade Pathological
items.description: ISUP Grade Group from prostatectomy specimen

items.name: Number of Cores Positive
items.description: Number of biopsy cores positive for carcinoma
items.valid_codes: 00-99=Number of positive cores, X8=Not applicable, X9=Unknown

items.name: Number of Cores Examined
items.description: Total number of prostate biopsy cores examined

items.name: Percent Cores Positive
items.description: Percentage of biopsy cores positive for carcinoma

items.name: Extraprostatic Extension
items.description: Presence of extraprostatic extension on prostatectomy

derivation_rules.Very Low: T1c, Grade Group 1, PSA <10, <3 positive cores, <=50% core involvement
derivation_rules.Favorable Intermediate: 1 intermediate factor (T2b-T2c OR Grade Group 2-3 OR PSA 10-20), Grade Group 1-2, <50% positive cores
derivation_rules.Unfavorable Intermediate: 2-3 intermediate factors OR Grade Group 3 OR >=50% positive cores
derivation_rules.High: T3a OR Grade Group 4-5 OR PSA >20
derivation_rules.Very High: T3b-T4 OR Primary Gleason 5 OR >4 cores Grade Group 4-5
